markdown:
#  How do I delete line items in approved change orders? 
If you have approved any other change orders since creating the change order you want to edit, you will need to change their status to 'Draft'. You can then set the change order you want to edit to 'Draft' and make any additional edits.
## See Also

title: How do I delete line items in approved change orders?
